findings.description: Email mailto link incorrectly injected around unrelated body text in Section 1.1 Project Description. The text about the Carolina heelsplitter is wrapped in an <a href='mailto:aeckardt@wildlandseng.com'> tag that does not exist in the PDF. The email address belongs to a separate section (the cover letter) and should not wrap ecological description text.
findings.evidence: HTML: '…North Carolina to still support the Carolina heelsplitter (Lasmigona decorata), a federally and state endangered freshwater mussel." According to the report, improving and protecting…'. PDF page 6: This is plain body text with no hyperlink. The email aeckardt@wildlandseng.com only appears in the cover letter on page 4.
